This directory contains predicates.c from:

Jonathan Richard Shewchuk,
"Adaptive Precision Floating-Point Arithmetic and Fast Robust Geometric Predicates",
Discrete & Computational Geometry 18:305-363, 1997.

Original source:
https://www.cs.cmu.edu/~quake/robust.html

The predicates implementation is placed in the public domain by the author.
See the original header in predicates.c for full details.

No modifications have been made except (if any):
